prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find Go source files in kubernetes/kubernetes and prometheus/prometheus that implement configuration hot-reload (no process restart): the file watcher setup, the config diff detection, and the atomic config swap that applies new config without dropping connections.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the multi-org-go fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find Go source files in kubernetes/kubernetes and prometheus/prometheus that implement configuration hot-reload (no process restart): the file watcher setup, the config diff detection, and the atomic config swap that applies new config without dropping connections.
